# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-application
  namespace: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-application
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-application
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web-application
        image: your-web-application-image
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached-cache
  namespace: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached-cache
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached-cache
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached-cache
        image: memcached:latest
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
  namespace: production
spec:
  replicas: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-workers
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: background-workers
        image: your-background-workers-image
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached-cache
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
